title: Iran and the U.S. Have an Understanding. Will It Lead to a Deal?
summary_full: Europe and the larger world will be watching carefully to see if talks produce a lasting agreement on Iran’s nuclear program and the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Europe and the larger world will be watching carefully to see if talks produce a lasting agreement on Iran’s nuclear program and the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: lasting agreement on Iran’s nuclear program and the Strait of Hormuz
